creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Hello, this is not a bug but a user question (basically). the file is 
delivered by default with normal installations and if you do not have it 
something went wrong in a proces. if you still have the cd's available 
or a 5.5 install-base, you can copy the file to /usr/sbin which should 
work, in addition you could fetch the latest sources for the src/ tree 
and rebuild your entire system (please follow the information in the 
handbook (http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/handbook/) and if you have 
more questions please ask them on the questions mailinglist. Resolving 
the ticket due to 'not a bug'.
